description: Create the complete project structure, design system CSS, shared JavaScript modules, and all page HTML shells with navigation/footer. This is the foundation that all other features build upon.
steps: Create the directory structure: zevrian-site/ with subdirectories css/, js/, images/, shop/, shop/kitchen-dining/, shop/home-organization/, shop/travel-outdoor/, shop/product/, contact/, privacy-policy/, terms-of-service/

Create zevrian-site/css/styles.css with a complete design system: CSS custom properties for colors (Primary #0F1A2E, Accent #C9A96E, Surface #FAFAFA, Muted #6B7280, Border #E5E7EB, White #FFFFFF), typography scale using Inter font, responsive grid system using CSS Grid/Flexbox, utility classes for spacing/sizing, component styles for buttons (primary gold accent, secondary outlined), cards, navigation, footer, forms, modals, toast notifications, star ratings, and responsive breakpoints (mobile-first)

Create zevrian-site/js/products.js containing the complete product data array of 18 products with: id, slug, name, price, category, categorySlug, description, features (array of 4-5 bullet points), rating (4.5-4.9 range), reviewCount, placeholder image color/pattern identifier. Products organized in 3 categories of 6 each: Kitchen & Dining, Home Organization, Travel & Outdoor

Create zevrian-site/js/main.js with shared functionality: mobile menu toggle, smooth scroll, newsletter form handler with validation and toast notification, utility functions for rendering product cards, generating star rating HTML, formatting currency

Create zevrian-site/js/cart.js with checkout modal functionality: open/close modal, form validation for card number/expiry/CVV with real-time formatting, PayPal button handler, success/error toast states, Stripe-style card input masking

Create the HTML shell template used by all pages: DOCTYPE html5, head with meta tags (viewport, charset, description, og tags), Google Fonts link for Inter, stylesheet link, inline SVG logo in header nav with 'Z' monogram + 'ZEVRIAN' wordmark, responsive navigation links (Home, Shop dropdown with 3 categories, Contact), mobile hamburger menu, footer with copyright '2026 Zevrian Global LLC. All rights reserved. Located in Sheridan, Wyoming, USA.', footer links to Privacy Policy and Terms of Service, script tags

Create zevrian-site/index.html (Homepage): Hero section with headline about premium lifestyle products and 'Shop Now' CTA, brand story/vision section, featured products grid (6 items pulled from products.js), newsletter subscription form with email validation
Create zevrian-site/shop/index.html (Main Shop page): Page header, 3 category cards linking to sub-pages, full product grid of all 18 products with filter/sort UI placeholder
Create zevrian-site/shop/kitchen-dining/index.html: Category hero, 6 product cards for Kitchen & Dining category
Create zevrian-site/shop/home-organization/index.html: Category hero, 6 product cards for Home Organization category
Create zevrian-site/shop/travel-outdoor/index.html: Category hero, 6 product cards for Travel & Outdoor category

Create zevrian-site/contact/index.html: Page with two distinct form sections - Customer Support Form (name, email, order number, subject, message) and Supplier/Partner Form (company name, contact name, email, phone, message, type of inquiry dropdown). Display corporate address: 30 N Gould St Ste N, Sheridan, WY 82801. Both forms with client-side validation and success toast notifications.

Create zevrian-site/privacy-policy/index.html: Standard privacy policy page referencing Zevrian Global LLC, Wyoming jurisdiction, standard sections (information collection, use, sharing, cookies, security, contact)

Create zevrian-site/terms-of-service/index.html: Standard terms page referencing Zevrian Global LLC, Wyoming jurisdiction, standard sections (acceptance, use license, product purchases, disclaimers, limitations, governing law)
Create zevrian-site/404.html: Custom 404 page with brand styling, message, and link back to homepage
acceptance_criteria: CSS file contains complete design system with all specified colors as custom properties
products.js contains all 18 products with complete data fields
All HTML pages have consistent navigation with working links between pages
Logo SVG renders in the header of every page
Footer on every page shows exact copyright text specified
All JS files pass syntax validation via node -c
Contact page has two separate forms with validation
Homepage has hero, brand story, featured products grid, and newsletter form
Shop pages render product cards with names, prices, ratings, and Buy on Amazon + Buy Direct buttons
Product cards have 'Buy on Amazon' as primary CTA and 'Buy Direct' as secondary CTA triggering checkout modal
Checkout modal has Stripe-style card inputs and PayPal option
verification: Run: find /projects/sandbox/zevrian-site -name '*.html' | sort - verify all expected HTML files exist

Run: node --check /projects/sandbox/zevrian-site/js/products.js && node --check /projects/sandbox/zevrian-site/js/main.js && node --check /projects/sandbox/zevrian-site/js/cart.js - verify no JS syntax errors
Run: grep -l 'Zevrian Global LLC' /projects/sandbox/zevrian-site/**/*.html - verify corporate name present in relevant pages
Run: grep '#0F1A2E' /projects/sandbox/zevrian-site/css/styles.css && grep '#C9A96E' /projects/sandbox/zevrian-site/css/styles.css - verify design system colors
findings: All files created and verified. JS syntax passes with NODE_OPTIONS="" node --check. Footer text verified on all 9 pages. All 18 products validated with complete data fields (6 per category). Directory structure matches requirements. Node.js requires NODE_OPTIONS="" to clear the proxy-bootstrap preload that causes MODULE_NOT_FOUND errors.
